backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing an e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, and user profile management, using authorization mixins and blob storage for product images.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old family messaging app state (with userProfiles, messages) into new e-commerce state (products, carts, orders, userProfiles), initializing empty maps for the new schema.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: replacing family messaging with e-commerce, product catalog, shopping cart, checkout process, and Internet Identity authentication.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of all frontend files describing components for e-commerce UI including product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, user profiles, and authentication with agricultural branding theme.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining agricultural color palette using OKLCH color space with greens and earth tones, plus light/dark theme variables for e-commerce UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with updated title 'Bhai Bhai Fertilizer - Quality Agricultural Products' and root div for React app mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow, user profile setup, and TanStack Router configuration for product catalog, cart, checkout, confirmation, and profile routes.
frontend/src/components/AuthScreen.tsx: Authentication component handling Internet Identity login and new user profile registration form collecting name, email, and shipping address.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Shopping cart icon button with badge showing item count, navigates to cart page when clicked.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Legacy chat interface component with optimized rendering, removed blur effects, and improved UI element clarity (no longer used in e-commerce app).
frontend/src/components/CheckoutForm.tsx: Checkout form component that collects shipping address, displays cart summary, and processes order completion with validation and navigation to confirmation page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner component displaying the main landing section with branding, tagline, feature highlights (organic, high yield, soil health), and hero image.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper providing header with logo/navigation, authenticated user controls (cart, profile, logout), main content outlet, and footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/OrderConfirmatio: Order success page displaying confirmation message with checkmark icon and navigation buttons to continue shopping or view profile.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product display card showing image, name, description, price, and add-to-cart button with loading and success states.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Main product listing page with hero section and grid of product cards, handling loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/ShoppingCart.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with images, quantities, prices, remove/clear actions, and checkout button with order summary.
frontend/src/components/UserProfile.tsx: React component for displaying and editing user profile information (name, email, shipping address) with form validation, loading states, and navigation back to products.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control with admin token from URL params, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profiles, products, shopping cart operations (add/remove/clear items), and checkout functionality with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with agricultural-themed color palette (greens and earth tones), custom component styles for product cards and e-commerce elements, and utility animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities for sensitive parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container queries, animations, and custom keyframes for accordion and fade-in effects.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting an e-commerce platform for Bhai Bhai Fertilizer company, tracking existing features (originally a family messaging app being converted), image requirements, and architectural notes about product catalog and order processing.
